expectations.evidence: Agent read SKILL.md and followed process

expectations.text: Multiple .feature files were created, organized by domain concept
expectations.evidence: 5 files: cluster-erkennung, cluster-darstellung, cluster-verwaltung, cluster-persistenz, cluster-layout

expectations.text: Scenarios for automatic cluster detection exist
Scenarios for visual cluster representation exist
Scenarios for saving/loading cluster data exist
Scenarios for manual cluster merge/dissolve exist
Each scenario tests exactly one behavior
expectations.evidence: 38 scenarios, declarative style, one behavior each

expectations.text: All 5 requirement areas have at least one scenario each

expectations.evidence: German domain language, no API calls or database operations
